content: Now that List.join is in, I'd like to pick up List.keep_oks and List.keep_errs from #9596 — filter-map keeping the Ok (resp. Err) side of a Try-returning function. Pure Roc, modelled on List.keep_if; one PR, one commit each. Anyone already on these?
Opened this as #10240, ready for review whenever someone has a moment. :folded_hands:
